tasks.subject: Task 1: Add visited to state and persist it
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Track visited scenes in state with full undo support.

**Files:**
- Modify: `engine.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `state.visited` initialised as `[]` on new game
- [ ] `navigateTo()` pushes previous scene to `visited` before moving
- [ ] `pushHistory()` snapshots `visited`
- [ ] `undo()` restores `visited`
- [ ] Old saves default `visited` to `[]`

**Verify:** Load demo, visit start ‚Üí path_a ‚Üí undo ‚Üí path_a. Check localStorage ‚Äî `visited` contains `["start"]`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine.js"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["state.visited initialised as []", "navigateTo pushes previous scene", "pushHistory snapshots visited", "undo restores visited", "old saves default to []"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Evaluate conditional blocks at render time
tasks.description:
**Goal:** renderNarrative evaluates each block's if condition, rendering text/else/nothing accordingly.

**Files:**
- Modify: `engine.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Plain/voice-tagged blocks without `if` render as before
- [ ] `if: visited` checks `state.visited.includes(sceneId)`
- [ ] flags/flags_unset/stats conditions work
- [ ] `else` renders when condition fails; no else = skip
- [ ] playBlocks gets rendered count not raw count

**Verify:** Add `if: visited` block to demo start scene. First visit shows else, undo+revisit shows if-branch.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine.js"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["plain blocks unchanged", "if:visited evaluates correctly", "else renders on failure", "missing else skips block", "playBlocks uses rendered count"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Update template and stage-3 docs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add conditional block YAML examples to scene template and authoring guidance to stage-3.

**Files:**
- Modify: `templates/scene.yaml`
- Modify: `docs/storycrafting/stage-3-scene-writing.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Template has conditional block examples for visited, flags, stats
- [ ] Stage-3 has Conditional Blocks section with guidance
- [ ] Guidance warns against gating critical info in conditional blocks

**Verify:** Read both files.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["templates/scene.yaml", "docs/storycrafting/stage-3-scene-writing.md"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["template has conditional examples", "stage-3 has conditional blocks section", "no-critical-gates warning present"]}
```
